examples: We bought a camper van so we could go away whenever the fancy took us.
We come upon a small caravan camper with its door open to a late-middle-aged Scottish couple, sitting at a folding table, taking tea and biscuits.
For the next seven years, she lived in a camper with a man she had met.
Cornwall Council has introduced a new midnight to 09:00 ban on camper vans at South Fistral.
